creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
> Maintainer of dns/ldns,
    
  > Please note that PR ports/182224 has just been submitted.
    
  > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
  > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
  > and a committer will take care of it.
    
  > The full text of the PR can be found at:
  >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182224

I do not agree with this fix. The root cause is a flaw in the
original distribution and the PR 182224 is just a work around.

There is another PR waiting which fixes this better. See PR
ports/182183 for details http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=182183

Regards,

	jaap
